title: Análise de Expected Value (EV) e All-In Equity
plan: Extend parser (ggpoker.py/pokerstars.py) to extract opponent cards from showdown sections and detect all-in situations with revealed cards
Extend HandData model in base.py to include opponent_cards and all-in metadata fields
Add database migration in schema.py for new columns (opponent_cards, ev_result, allin_street) on hands table
Add new repository queries in repository.py to fetch all-in hands with showdown data, grouped by stakes
Update importer.py to persist opponent cards and all-in metadata during import
Create new src/analyzers/ev.py module with equity calculator (preflop lookup table + Monte Carlo for postflop), EV computation, EV-adjusted results, bb/100 real vs EV-adjusted, and luck factor
Implement cumulative EV line vs Real line data generation for SVG charting
Add stakes separation logic (group by blind levels) for all EV metrics
Add EV Analysis section to cash_report.py with inline SVG chart (EV line vs Real line), bb/100 table, luck factor display, and per-stakes breakdown
Create tests/test_ev.py with comprehensive tests for equity calculation, all-in detection, EV-adjusted computation, bb/100, luck factor, and SVG generation
Run full quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build) and fix any failures
